extensionName.description: Chrome Web Store and browser extension name.

extensionDescription.message: Copy a selected DevTools element as one JSON bundle with DOM, locators, styles, and page context.
extensionDescription.description: Chrome Web Store and browser extension summary.

devtoolsPageTitle.description: Title for the hidden DevTools page that registers the sidebar.

devtoolsSidebarTitle.description: Title shown in the Chrome DevTools Elements sidebar tab.

sidebarHeading.description: Main heading in the DevTools sidebar.

sidebarSubtitle.message: Copy the selected DevTools element as one DOM and locator bundle.
sidebarSubtitle.description: Short explanation under the sidebar heading.

bundleActionsAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the toolbar containing copy and refresh actions.

bundleOptionsAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the capture options group.

copyBundleButton.description: Primary button that copies the evidence bundle.

refreshButton.description: Button that refreshes the selected element evidence.

formatLabel.description: Label for the output format selector.

stylesLabel.description: Label for the computed styles selector.

stylesPracticalOption.description: Computed styles option that captures a smaller practical subset.

stylesAllOption.description: Computed styles option that captures all computed properties.

includeStylesLabel.description: Checkbox label for including computed styles in the copied evidence.

selectedElementHeading.description: Heading for the selected element summary.

selectElementPrompt.description: Placeholder shown when no selected element evidence is available.

statusOpenInDevTools.message: Open this page as a Chrome DevTools sidebar.
statusOpenInDevTools.description: Error shown when the sidebar page is opened outside Chrome DevTools.

statusCopied.description: Status shown after the copy button writes the bundle to the clipboard.

statusReading.description: Status shown while the sidebar reads the DevTools-selected element.

statusBundleReady.description: Status shown after evidence is successfully collected.

statusNoSelectedElementFound.description: Generic error shown when evidence collection returns no selected element.

statusUnknownError.description: Fallback text for an unknown DevTools error code.

statusDevToolsEvaluationFailed.description: Error shown when chrome.devtools.inspectedWindow.eval fails with a DevTools error.

statusPageEvaluationFailedWithDetail.description: Error shown when inspected page evaluation fails with a message.

statusClipboardWriteFailed.description: Error shown if the fallback clipboard write command fails.

captureErrorNoElementSelected.description: Evidence collector error shown when $0 is empty.

captureErrorNotElement.message: The selected DevTools value is not an element node.
captureErrorNotElement.description: Evidence collector error shown when $0 is not an element.

bundlePreviewAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the preview code block.
